title: Vitax Azalea, Rhododendron & Shrub Feed - Boosts All Ericaceous Plants - 0.9kg Pouch
features: High-quality feed for all ericaceous plants
Organic based formula with added iron for robust plants and vibrant flowers
Ideal for heather, acid-loving plants, blueberries and raspberries
description: Product Description For healthy growth and flowering of ericaceous plants, Azalea, Rhododendron & Shrub Fertiliser is perfect for acid-loving plants. Ingredients Compound Fertiliser containing Magnesium with trace elements 9:7.5:10.2 Directions 1. Open the resealable pouch and take out the required amount of fertilizer. 2. Apply the fertilizer to the base of the target plants, following the recommended coverage. 3. Gently mix the fertilizer into the topsoil around the plants. 4. Water the plants thoroughly after application. 5. Reapply the fertilizer every 4-6 weeks during the growing season. Safety Warning Keep away from children and pets. Do not ingest. Avoid contact with skin and eyes. Store in a cool, dry place. In case of accidental contact, wash immediately with clean water. If swallowed, seek medical attention immediately. See more
